pending.body: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2457-2463` only treats `InvocationTimeout` and `InvocationFailed` as transient. `AgentExecutionService::invoke` always runs `check_availability` before the actual invocation (`src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:197-208`), and OpenRouter turns transient probe/network failures into `BackendUnavailable` (`src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:187-206`). Because `BackendUnavailable` is never considered retryable here, a temporary availability-probe blip on a final-review reviewer or arbiter still fails or degrades the panel immediately instead of consuming the new per-member retry budget.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 6 -> Plan and Implement
